title: ロンリーリバーの危機

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
"A distinctive rowan tree. At its roots, a large hollow." Yes, this has
got to be the Lonely River!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
A large hollow... You mean that over there? Ah, sorry to keep asking
questions! I actually tried to find out what would be waiting for us
here before coming!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't find the movie anywhere, so we'll have to rely on you
for everything, I'm afraid.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Oh yeah... I'm the only one who knows the story. I-I've got to take
the lead!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
S-so what we'll try and do now is cross the stepping stone path over
the river and get the gemstone from the pedestal.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! But I don't see any stepping stones in the river, or a pedestal!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
There's a trick to it! If you flip the switch, the stones and the pedestal
will rise out from the water!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: And that switch is right here in the hollow of this rowan tree... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what? The switch is supposed to be here... Instead there's
writing... "The longest beard in the forest"...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Maybe, if the trial was exactly the same as the movie, people would
be able to cheat, so they changed it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah! True, I hadn't thought of that. Ummm, ummm... let's just try
searching around!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I can't see it. What even is "the longest beard in the forest"
anyway?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! El, look at that! It's a long, thick ivy branch! It goes all the way
from the top of the tree down to the river!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It looks strong enough to make into a swing. Tannhauser, go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Roger! I'll just get comfy in here and swiiing! Swing-a-linga-ding!
Woohoo! This is fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...What was that?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Is this the switch?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble, rumble!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that sound?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Look over there! Stones have risen out from the river!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Someone must've found the switch. So... once the stones come out,
what do we do again?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! W-we have to act fast, so I'll g-go on ahead!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Calm down, Rob Roy! What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Well, if it's the same as in Rhodonite, then the stepping stones will only stay for a few minutes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So there's a time limit. In that case, why don't we flip the switch and
start again—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
We can't! "Under the moonlight, the magic replenishes." Which means
it only works once per day!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Well, we don't wanna miss our chance! Okay, I'm confident in my
speed!

text_block_list.name: Dober & Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
W-wait!
Ah! T-Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gotta be quick but careful! Hop, step, jump! Whoa, it's slippery!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-will she be okay? The rocks will sink if she doesn't get back in
time, right?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You're actually supposed to cross the steps while holding on to a
long vine for safety, but I haven't seen it anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, there was a vine? Oh well, don't worry! I'm almost at the stone—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ah?! My step is sinking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gah! What?! I-I'm being swept away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Machitan, swooping in!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think I flipped the switch by accident—sorry! Hey, are you holding
on, Taiki? Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hold on to the vine and I'll take you to shore, my princess! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes! You're my hero!

text_block_list.name: Dober & Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ph...phew!
